breathing is difficult?

Wow, that's...

just, she mentioned this morning.

I'm being more, um, indirect just because.

She said that she could take on another one.
So that indicates to me that she has some room to help with like tag this week.
So I would ask her if there's, just to take something off your plate.
Yeah, I think the Adventures Group for me is the hardest client because they have 120 products.

It's the agentic feature, I forgot the name, so just a second.
And then I.
I uploaded it to Atlas, and you can, I uploaded all the 130-something tours, and then you can ask, like, what tours do you recommend for a group of friends in Cabo?

But basically, to identify, if I'm writing about summer in Cabo, to be able to select the tours to offer, so in each article.
thank God.
That exists now?
That exists?

Okay.

Knowledge Base.

Great, good.

they don't, we do.

We can, yeah, we should definitely, sorry, I'm, like, split focus, and I'm just going to message Tara and say, like, no problem at all.
But, anyway, so we do have that knowledge base built, or.

So this is what I uploaded to Atlas now.
So we always, I've been building this space for like five months or so, and I upload it to Atlas now.

Do we, I'm sorry that this will be repetitive.
I know I get like all of the accounts kind of mixed up sometimes, but is that something where we have tour A versus tour B content?
Even if there isn't necessarily search, I'm just thinking of like, that's something that like we could easily turn into.
To a programmatic workflow for them.
Yeah, but if nobody does this search, and also like programmatic, for example, Marcos did generate from sheet, he tried something, it worked.

And it generates an article like any other article.
Okay.
it's like, we have to still copy to a document, edit everything, add links.
So it's not like we generate everything automatically and then publish automatically.
So it's, yeah, I don't, I don't know, like the, the agentic workflow, the, the regular, editorial articles work pretty well for, for the adventures group.
So that's why I always say like, for me.
The programmatic SEO is something you apply when you want to solve a business problem, not the other way around.
You implement PSO and then you find a problem to solve.
I think in this editorial works pretty good.
And we did.
We used a templated article, so we did all the programmatic things we could have built, we did.
But the process after generating is as many more.

I feel like TAG is one where there is a lot of opportunity to, like I know that these processes could be more efficient, but I also feel like the blocker for you and for me and anyone else, especially the engineering team, is just like finding the time to surface all the available workflows that we can leverage and like audit the process.
this Veers.

It's just, like, the upfront cost of, like, going through it.
But, did you have that call with, um, engineering?
I believe you said Andy.
I did.
Mm-hmm.
Okay.
He, he tried.
Okay.
It worked.
So, we already have one to generate from, from that, uh, restaurant sheet.
Cool.
Okay.
Um, well, great.
Uh, also, I know you're under the weather.
If there's, like, I would, I would ask Sucheta to help, um, if there are things.

And also, like, with Teandra out, and you.
Being across all these different things, like just like making your life a little bit easier.

And then also if there's anything that you can delegate to, like even to me tomorrow, I should have time in the afternoon, like an hour in the afternoon, if there's anything that you want Overflow help on.
I'm not sure.
I'm generating this week's articles for the Adventures group.
And what else?
Maybe generating for Ambient, those we approved.
Great.
The article approved.
Cool.
Do you want any help with updating the artifact?
Oh, we talked about this.

And the question is...
What's advisable to do there?
We might just, like, want to play around with it, maybe, and add more and see if it just kind of incorporates things.
I don't know how to, there is a way to create a new writing guideline and paste that, but I don't know how to connect the writing guideline to the workflow.
Because the workflow uses the main writing guideline, and if you want to change for another one, test another one, I don't know how to do that.
Could we, could we just update the, update that standard writing guideline and save the old ones?
Yes, I'm doing some updates.
For example, he said, do not say threat prevention, he always says threat detection, so I added this there.
Cool.
And for now, we have their messaging uploaded in a cloud project, so we're running everything through this cloud project to make sure it resonates.
getting the, the, we're getting getting getting we're we're we're getting the, the, the, we're we're we're

Okay, great.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content strategy and operational blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Abnormal Security:** Shifting from high-difficulty "glossary" terms (e.g., "VPN") to "editorial" content (e.g., "cybersecurity program") to leverage its proven faster growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**The Adventurers Group (TAG):** Article generation is slow (\~50 min/article), but a new Atlas "Knowledge Base" feature is now automating tour selection, replacing a manual process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Resource Management:** Sucheta has capacity to assist with TAG articles, and Mara offered support to help Mariana manage workload while Teandra is out.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Client Framing:** Future content proposals will be framed as either a "traffic play" or a "conversion play" to align with client goals and manage expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Topics

### Abnormal Security Content Strategy

  - [Mariana is completing a 2-month keyword/title plan for Abnormal Security.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shifting focus from "glossary" to "editorial" content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Editorial topics have lower keyword difficulty (KD) and are growing much faster.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - **Target:** Keywords with \~300 volume and KD \<35.
  - [**Career Guide:** A new project with a promising average KD of 35.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Client Alignment:** Mara will share the memo with Megan to gather feedback before a broader presentation, ensuring priorities are aligned.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

### The Adventurers Group (TAG) Workflow

  - [**Challenge:** Article generation is slow (\~50 min/article), with research taking \~18 min and drafting \~31 min.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new Atlas "Knowledge Base" now automates tour selection, replacing a manual process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Process:** Mariana extracted data from 130+ tour pages into a Notion database, then uploaded it to the Atlas Knowledge Base.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**Functionality:** The AI can now instantly recommend tours based on a query (e.g., "tours for friends in Cabo").](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO (PSO):** Not a current priority.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The post-generation editing workflow remains manual, and editorial content is already performing well.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Principle:** PSO should solve a business problem, not be implemented for its own sake.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

### Resource & Workload Management

  - [**Context:** Mariana is managing a heavy workload while Teandra is out.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Available Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**Sucheta:** Has capacity to assist with TAG articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**Mara:** Offered support for tomorrow afternoon.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Delegation Plan:** Mariana will delegate TAG articles to Sucheta and generate approved Ambient articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

### Ambient Content & Workflow

  - [**Task:** Generate approved articles for Ambient.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Workflow Issue:** The standard writing guideline's 600-word limit is too short for Ambient.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Unsure how to connect a new, longer writing guideline to the workflow without overwriting the main one.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**Current Workaround:** All content is run through a cloud project containing Ambient's messaging to ensure brand voice alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
      - [Delegate TAG articles to Sucheta.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
      - [Generate approved Ambient articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Investigate how to connect a new writing guideline to the Ambient workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**Mara:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
      - [Share the Abnormal Security memo with Megan for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
      - [Check in with Mariana tomorrow to offer support.](https://fathom.video/share/Ksu_6c815q_PEEZGhoPsGfCSPPHrAso2?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

action_items.description: Review Mariana's memo; loop in Megan re: priorities before broader share
Schedule Abnormal presentation w/ Abnormal team to sell editorial-first vision
Ask Sucheta to generate approved Ambient articles
Check in w/ Mariana re: delegation; offer 1h overflow help
